description: Crafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, kiara bags use the finest materials and hardware in their products. This stylishly silhouetted bag embodies the essence of the modern Indian woman - unapologetically fashionable. This bag has a leatherite upper and elegant bronze hardware adds a stylish spin to your off-duty ensemble. Expand your bag collection with this accessory. Height: 27 cmWidth: 38 cmDepth: 12 cmLeatherite upper with a buckle detail for absolute durabilityTwo short handles and one removable and adjustable handle for carrying easeOne zippered compartment with an inner zippered pocket and organizer sleevesZippered pocket on the backBag careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
